{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Cashier",
  "description": "Food4Less Grocery is a budget-friendly supermarket chain offering a wide selection of fresh produce, pantry staples, household essentials, and quality groceries at unbeatable prices. Committed to affordability and convenience, Food4Less provides customers with a no-frills shopping experience while maintaining high standards of quality and freshness. With multiple locations, the store caters to diverse communities, ensuring access to cost-effective grocery solutions for families and individuals alike.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Cashier

Job Location: Ikirun, Osun
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities


	Accurate sales using the point-of-sales Software provided.
	Cross-checking the POS to ensure goods machined are the same as goods being packed for customers.
	Correct reporting of sales with clear distinction of cash from cheques and others approved medium of payment.
	Accurate delivery of daily sales to the manager or accountant on duty.
	Scanning items and explaining prices to customers.
	Keeping the checkout area, clean and orderly.
	Basic math and numerical skills.
	Communication and interpersonal skills.
	Customer service skill /Attention to detail.
	Conflict management and problem-solving.
	Any other duties that may be assigned by your Supervisor.


Requirements


	Interested candidates should possess an NCE, OND, or HND qualification with 0 - 1 year of work experience.
	Proximity to Ikirun is key and female is preferred.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: recruitment@food4lessgrocery.com using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

Cashier Job at Food4less Supermarket




        
    

        
        Food4Less Grocery is a budget-friendly supermarket chain offering a wide selection of fresh produce, pantry staples, household essentials, and quality groceries at unbeatable prices. Committed to affordability and convenience, Food4Less provides customers with a no-frills shopping experience while maintaining high standards of quality and freshness. With multiple locations, the store caters to diverse communities, ensuring access to cost-effective grocery solutions for families and individuals alike.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Cashier

Job Location: Ikirun, Osun
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Accurate sales using the point-of-sales Software provided.
	Cross-checking the POS to ensure goods machined are the same as goods being packed for customers.
	Correct reporting of sales with clear distinction of cash from cheques and others approved medium of payment.
	Accurate delivery of daily sales to the manager or accountant on duty.
	Scanning items and explaining prices to customers.
	Keeping the checkout area, clean and orderly.
	Basic math and numerical skills.
	Communication and interpersonal skills.
	Customer service skill /Attention to detail.
	Conflict management and problem-solving.
	Any other duties that may be assigned by your Supervisor.


Requirements


	Interested candidates should possess an NCE, OND, or HND qualification with 0 - 1 year of work experience.
	Proximity to Ikirun is key and female is preferred.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Finance & Admin Officer",
  "description": "Sophia ERP Limited (SEL) is an Enterprise Solutions Development Organization, on a mission to power Governments and Businesses with cost effective and suitable Digital Transformation solutions.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Finance &amp; Admin Officer

Job Location: Ojodu, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Description


	The Finance and Admin Officer will record and report financial/client transactions as well as coordinate business operations in order to ensure organizational effectiveness, efficiency, productivity and profitability.
	The Finance and Admin Officer is generally responsible for managing intra and inter-office communication, maintaining a streamlined administrative system, coordinating manpower for effectiveness, responding to/resolving client queries, developing strategies for improving customer relationships, fostering/on-boarding/maintaining business relationships with new and existing customers.


Job Responsibilities
Finance:


	Document and Report on all financial transactions of the Company.
	Effectively manage Company&rsquo;s cash flow and recommend financial actions by analyzing accounting options.
	Analyze/summarize financial status by collecting information; preparing key management reports.
	Monitor, Liaise and send prompt reminders to Clients on all Retainers and Service offerings. Generate and send Invoices and Receipts upon payment.
	Substantiate all financial transactions by collecting and maintaining relevant documents.
	Maintain accounting controls by preparing and recommending policies and procedures. Reconcile financial discrepancies by collecting and analyzing account information.
	Prepare accounts, Tax returns and work with Auditor to ensure compliance with all Tax obligations to Tax Authorities.
	Administer Staff Payroll and effect payment to all 3rd Party Vendors.


Client Service:


	Communicate effectively with clients on all requests, queries using available and authorized channels to ensure speedy response and resolution.
	Communicate with teams and management on Project status with the view to ensuring Client satisfaction and Project implementation based on Project scope, standard and timeline.
	Ensure full and proactive compliance with Client SLAs/Agreements/Contract terms.
	Organize/schedule, coordinate/participate and report on client engagements


Administration:


	Manage office supplies.
	Ensure compliance with Company Policies and Procedures
	Manage Manpower acquisition, on-boarding, retention, performance and disengagement.
	Allocate tasks and assignments to Teams and monitor for performance.
	Maintain a safe, clean, professional and productive business environment.


Education/Professional Qualification


	B.Sc. Degree in Accounting or Economics
	Commenced / Completed ICAN or ACCA
	Any Leadership course will be an advantage.


Key Competencies:


	Self-motivation
	Integrity
	Business acumen and interest
	Customer centric and organizational skills
	Analytical and strategic thinking
	Multi-tasking capability
	Performance and Task driven Team Leader who can meet deadlines
	Effective Communication, Interpersonal and People Management Skills
	Proficiency in the use of any Accounting Software and general IT tools
	Awareness of industry&rsquo;s latest technology trends and applications.


Salary
N70,000 - N150,000 monthly.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: careers@sophiaerp.com using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",
  "datePosted": "2026-05-15",
  "validThrough": "2026-07-01",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",
  "hiringOrganization": {
    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "Sophia ERP Limited"
    
  },
  "jobLocation": {
    "@type": "Place",
    "address": {
      "@type": "PostalAddress",
       "postalCode": ". ",

}



Finance & Admin Officer Job at Sophia ERP Limited




        
    

        
        Sophia ERP Limited (SEL) is an Enterprise Solutions Development Organization, on a mission to power Governments and Businesses with cost effective and suitable Digital Transformation solutions.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Finance & Admin Officer

Job Location: Ojodu, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Description
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	The Finance and Admin Officer will record and report financial/client transactions as well as coordinate business operations in order to ensure organizational effectiveness, efficiency, productivity and profitability.
	The Finance and Admin Officer is generally responsible for managing intra and inter-office communication, maintaining a streamlined administrative system, coordinating manpower for effectiveness, responding to/resolving client queries, developing strategies for improving customer relationships, fostering/on-boarding/maintaining business relationships with new and existing customers.


Job Responsibilities
Finance:


	Document and Report on all financial transactions of the Company.
	Effectively manage Company’s cash flow and recommend financial actions by analyzing accounting options.
	Analyze/summarize financial status by collecting information; preparing key management reports.
	Monitor, Liaise and send prompt reminders to Clients on all Retainers and Service offerings. Generate and send Invoices and Receipts upon payment.
	Substantiate all financial transactions by collecting and maintaining relevant documents.
	Maintain accounting controls by preparing and recommending policies and procedures. Reconcile financial discrepancies by collecting and analyzing account information.
	Prepare accounts, Tax returns and work with Auditor to ensure compliance with all Tax obligations to Tax Authorities.
	Administer Staff Payroll and effect payment to all 3rd Party Vendors.


Client Service:


	Communicate effectively with clients on all requests, queries using available and authorized channels to ensure speedy response and resolution.
	Communicate with teams and management on Project status with the view to ensuring Client satisfaction and Project implementation based on Project scope, standard and timeline.
	Ensure full and proactive compliance with Client SLAs/Agreements/Contract terms.
	Organize/schedule, coordinate/participate and report on client engagements


Administration:


	Manage office supplies.
	Ensure compliance with Company Policies and Procedures
	Manage Manpower acquisition, on-boarding, retention, performance and disengagement.
	Allocate tasks and assignments to Teams and monitor for performance.
	Maintain a safe, clean, professional and productive business environment.


Education/Professional Qualification


	B.Sc. Degree in Accounting or Economics
	Commenced / Completed ICAN or ACCA
	Any Leadership course will be an advantage.


Key Competencies:


	Self-motivation
	Integrity
	Business acumen and interest
	Customer centric and organizational skills
	Analytical and strategic thinking
	Multi-tasking capability
	Performance and Task driven Team Leader who can meet deadlines
	Effective Communication, Interpersonal and People Management Skills
	Proficiency in the use of any Accounting Software and general IT tools
	Awareness of industry’s latest technology trends and applications.


Salary
N70,000 - N150,000 monthly.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "description": "Pawa House is into hospitality busines (Resturant and Lounge) and in addition to Spa and Fitness Business.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Senior Operations Manager (Restaurant &amp; Lounge)

Job Location: Lekki, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	Senior Manager Operations in a restaurant is responsible for ensuring smooth and efficient restaurant operations, managing staff, and maintaining high standards of customer service.
	They oversee various aspects of the restaurant, including front-of-house and back-of-house operations, ensuring compliance with regulations, and contributing to the restaurant&#39;s financial performance.


Responsibilities


	Leadership and Team Management: Hire, train, and supervise employees to ensure productivity and excellent customer service.
	Operational oversight: Manage day-to-day operations, including scheduling, inventory control, and quality assurance.
	Customer Relations: Address customer inquiries and complaints, ensuring a high level of guest satisfaction.
	Financial Management: Monitor budgets, control costs, and analyze sales data to maximize profitability.
	Health and Safety Compliance: Ensure compliance with health, safety, and sanitation regulations.
	Marketing and Promotions: Collaborate on marketing initiatives to drive traffic and increase revenue.
	Vendor and Supplier Coordination: Maintain relationships with suppliers to ensure timely and cost-effective deliveries.


Qualifications / Requirements


	HND / BSc Degree in relevant field
	Proven experience in restaurant management or a similar role is required.
	Strong leadership and organizational skills with the ability to manage a diverse team.
	Excellent customer service and communication abilities.
	Proficiency in financial management, including budgeting and cost control.
	Familiarity with health and safety regulations for the restaurant industry.
	Ability to thrive in a fast-paced environment and adapt to changing priorities.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: officialpawahouse@gmail.com using the Job Positionas the subject of the mail.",

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Content Manager",
  "description": "Sovereign Finance Limited is a leading financial services provider with a prime desire to promote trailblazing Financial &amp; Investment solutions to customers in different sectors of the Nigerian economy. Our priority is to create opportunities for our clients to save accumulated capital and build sustainable wealth. The company is founded by a team of savvy finance &amp; investment specialist with evidence of track record of exceptional performance, superb integrity, and innovation. The company is at the center of financial innovation propelled by technological prowess and is at a position of pre-eminence in the Nigeria financial Industry.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Content Manager

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Role Overview


	The Content Manager will be the lead storyteller for the Group, with a mission to translate our established brand identities into engaging, high-performing content.
	You aren&#39;t just a writer; you are a brand guardian who ensures our voice remains consistent across all platforms while using creative flair to capture our audience&#39;s imagination.


Core Responsibilities


	Creative Storytelling: Transform complex group-wide initiatives and technical data into human-centric stories that resonate with our target audiences.
	Tone Alignment: Master the existing Tone of Voice (ToV) for each brand within the group, ensuring every piece of content, from a tweet to a whitepaper, is perfectly aligned with the established brand persona.
	Content Execution: Write, edit, and proofread high-quality copy for digital and print, including blog posts, email marketing, video scripts, and internal communications.
	Visual Collaboration: Work closely with the Creative Designerto ensure that copy and visuals work in harmony to tell a cohesive story.
	Editorial Management: Maintain a group-wide editorial calendar, coordinating with different department heads to ensure a steady stream of relevant content.
	Quality Control: Act as the final gatekeeper for all outgoing communications, ensuring zero compromise on brand standards, grammar, and narrative flow.


Key Skills &amp; Requirements


	Education: Bachelor&rsquo;s degree in English, Marketing, Communications, or a related field.
	Experience: 5+ years in Content Creation and Marketing, Journalism, Copywriting,or Brand Communications (Agency experience is a plus).
	Technical Savvy: Proficiency with CMS tools (WordPress, Contentful), SEO tools (Semrush/Ahrefs), etc.
	Adaptability: Proven ability to write for different industries and personas (B2B vs B2C).
	Project Management: Ability to manage multiple projects under tight deadlines without compromising on quality.
	The &quot;Creative Spark&quot;: A natural ability to find the &quot;hook&quot; in any topic and turn it into a compelling narrative.
	Meticulous Consistency: An eagle eye for detail and the ability to switch between different brand voices seamlessly.
	Versatile Writing: Proven experience in long-form (articles/reports) and short-form (social/ad copy) writing.
	Strategic Execution: Ability to take a high-level marketing brief and break it down into a creative content plan.
	Platform Knowledge: Solid understanding of how storytelling changes across LinkedIn, Instagram, Web, and Offline media.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Intrested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: careers@sovereignfinanceltd.com using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

  "validThrough": "2026-05-30",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",

    "@type": "Organization",

  },

Content Manager Job at Sovereign Finance Limited




        
    

        
        Sovereign Finance Limited is a leading financial services provider with a prime desire to promote trailblazing Financial & Investment solutions to customers in different sectors of the Nigerian economy. Our priority is to create opportunities for our clients to save accumulated capital and build sustainable wealth. The company is founded by a team of savvy finance & investment specialist with evidence of track record of exceptional performance, superb integrity, and innovation. The company is at the center of financial innovation propelled by technological prowess and is at a position of pre-eminence in the Nigeria financial Industry.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Content Manager
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Role Overview


	The Content Manager will be the lead storyteller for the Group, with a mission to translate our established brand identities into engaging, high-performing content.
	You aren't just a writer; you are a brand guardian who ensures our voice remains consistent across all platforms while using creative flair to capture our audience's imagination.


Core Responsibilities


	Creative Storytelling: Transform complex group-wide initiatives and technical data into human-centric stories that resonate with our target audiences.
	Tone Alignment: Master the existing Tone of Voice (ToV) for each brand within the group, ensuring every piece of content, from a tweet to a whitepaper, is perfectly aligned with the established brand persona.
	Content Execution: Write, edit, and proofread high-quality copy for digital and print, including blog posts, email marketing, video scripts, and internal communications.
	Visual Collaboration: Work closely with the Creative Designerto ensure that copy and visuals work in harmony to tell a cohesive story.
	Editorial Management: Maintain a group-wide editorial calendar, coordinating with different department heads to ensure a steady stream of relevant content.
	Quality Control: Act as the final gatekeeper for all outgoing communications, ensuring zero compromise on brand standards, grammar, and narrative flow.


Key Skills & Requirements


	Education: Bachelor’s degree in English, Marketing, Communications, or a related field.
	Experience: 5+ years in Content Creation and Marketing, Journalism, Copywriting,or Brand Communications (Agency experience is a plus).
	Technical Savvy: Proficiency with CMS tools (WordPress, Contentful), SEO tools (Semrush/Ahrefs), etc.
	Adaptability: Proven ability to write for different industries and personas (B2B vs B2C).
	Project Management: Ability to manage multiple projects under tight deadlines without compromising on quality.
	The "Creative Spark": A natural ability to find the "hook" in any topic and turn it into a compelling narrative.
	Meticulous Consistency: An eagle eye for detail and the ability to switch between different brand voices seamlessly.
	Versatile Writing: Proven experience in long-form (articles/reports) and short-form (social/ad copy) writing.
	Strategic Execution: Ability to take a high-level marketing brief and break it down into a creative content plan.
	Platform Knowledge: Solid understanding of how storytelling changes across LinkedIn, Instagram, Web, and Offline media.


Method of Application 
Intrested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

Creative Designer Job at Sovereign Finance Limited




        
    

        
        Sovereign Finance Limited is a leading financial services provider with a prime desire to promote trailblazing Financial & Investment solutions to customers in different sectors of the Nigerian economy. Our priority is to create opportunities for our clients to save accumulated capital and build sustainable wealth. The company is founded by a team of savvy finance & investment specialist with evidence of track record of exceptional performance, superb integrity, and innovation. The company is at the center of financial innovation propelled by technological prowess and is at a position of pre-eminence in the Nigeria financial Industry.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Creative Designer

Job Location: Lagos 
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description


	Sovereign Finance Company Limited (SFL) is seeking a versatile Creative Designer / Video Editor to join our growing team.
	In this role, you will develop engaging visual content across various platforms to support our marketing and communication initiatives.


Responsibilities
Graphic Design:


	Design high-quality visuals for print and digital marketing materials, including social media graphics, website elements, brochures, presentations, and marketing collateral.
	Develop and maintain brand identity across all visual materials.
	Collaborate with marketingand communication teams to understand design requirements and deliver creative solutions.


Video Editing:


	Edit and produce quality video contentfor various purposes, including social media campaigns, explainer videos, and promotional content.
	Source and incorporate high-quality audio and video assets.
	Manage and maintain video editing software and equipment.


Additional Responsibilities:


	Stay current with design trends and best practices.
	Assist with photography shoots as needed.
	Contribute to the overall creative direction of SFL's marketing efforts.


Qualifications


	Bachelor's Degree in Graphic Design, Multimedia Design, or a related field (preferred).
	Minimum of 3 years of experience in a graphic design and video editing role.
	Strong portfolio showcasing graphic design and video editing skills.
	Proficiency in Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator, InDesign, After Effects, Premiere Pro) or similar software.
	Excellent communication, collaboration, and time management skills.
	Ability to work independently and meet deadlines.
	Passion for design and a keen eye for detail.


Benefits


	Competitive salary and benefits package.
	Opportunity to work in a fast-paced and dynamic environment.
	Be part of a growing and successful financial services company.
	Contribute to creative and impactful marketing initiatives.


Method of Application 
Intrested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.
